title: Announcement on Integrated Master’s Program Application
content:
Announcement on Integrated Master’s Program Application

Applications for the

Üsküdar University Integrated Master’s Program

have begun.

The Integrated Master’s Program allows students who have successfully completed the first six or seven semesters of their undergraduate studies and who meet the required academic conditions to take graduate-level courses during their undergraduate education and to plan their master’s studies throughout their undergraduate period.

Please

click here

for detailed information about the application requirements and the Integrated Master’s Program.

Applications will be accepted between

February 24 and March 2, 2026

.

Please

click here

to apply the program.

Please

click here

to see which departments are eligible to apply to which programs.

If the language of instruction of the program applied for under the Integrated Master’s Program differs from the applicant’s undergraduate language of instruction, English language proficiency will be required from candidates whose undergraduate education was conducted in Turkish and whose master’s program is conducted in English.

Moreover, Turkish language proficiency will be required from international candidates whose undergraduate education was conducted in English and whose master’s program is conducted in Turkish.

The results will be announced on the relevant institute web pages of Üsküdar University.
